experiences.title: Full-Stack Feature Ownership
experiences.description: Led a 4-member team with end-to-end ownership across React, Node.js/Go APIs, and data layers — scoping, building, and shipping full-stack features from design handoff to production.

experiences.title: RAG-Powered Onboarding Chat
experiences.description: Built a RAG-powered onboarding chat using Qdrant and LLMs that lets customers query product documentation conversationally — reducing time-to-first-value and cutting inbound support dependency.

experiences.title: Event Sanity — Live SDK Debugger
experiences.description: Delivered a real-time SDK event debugger over Kafka, reducing campaign debugging time by 92% and enabling QA and business teams to validate event sequences without engineering involvement.

experiences.title: Design Editor UI
experiences.description: Replaced a developer-assisted campaign workflow with a Figma-inspired visual editor, giving marketers direct control over design tokens and cutting campaign iteration time from days to hours.

experiences.title: Configuration Error Intelligence
experiences.description: Built a configuration error intelligence layer that navigates operators directly to misconfigured fields with in-context highlights — eliminating SDK knowledge requirements and reducing support escalations.

experiences.title: Analytics Event Pipelines
experiences.description: Designed ClickHouse-backed event pipelines for high-volume ingestion and fast time-series aggregation powering real-time campaign performance dashboards.
